comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Add tests to tests/scripts/test_ticket_unblock.py for a new batch_close_operations function and --batch-close CLI entry point.

**Tests to write**:
- test_batch_close_finds_open_children: parent with 2 open children → returns both IDs in open_children
- test_batch_close_detects_unblocked: close a blocker → dependent appears in unblocked list
- test_batch_close_no_false_unblocks: ticket with remaining open blockers NOT in unblocked list (negative case)
- test_batch_close_excludes_archived: archived child ticket not returned in open_children
- test_batch_close_empty_tracker: empty/missing tracker → returns empty lists, no error
- test_batch_close_cli_outputs_json: invoke --batch-close via subprocess, verify JSON output format
- test_batch_close_single_reduce_call: mock reduce_all_tickets, verify called exactly once

**Test approach**: Create temporary tracker fixtures per test via tempfile.mkdtemp(). Call batch_close_operations() via Python import and --batch-close via subprocess. Assert on returned dict/JSON structure.

### Files to modify
- tests/scripts/test_ticket_unblock.py (add test functions)
- .test-index (add RED marker)

### TDD Requirement
All tests fail because batch_close_operations and --batch-close do not exist yet.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (excluding RED-marked tests)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Test test_batch_close_finds_open_children exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_batch_close_finds_open_children' tests/scripts/test_ticket_unblock.py
- [ ] Test test_batch_close_cli_outputs_json exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_batch_close_cli_outputs_json' tests/scripts/test_ticket_unblock.py
- [ ] Test test_batch_close_no_false_unblocks exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_batch_close_no_false_unblocks' tests/scripts/test_ticket_unblock.py
- [ ] .test-index RED marker added
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket-unblock.py.*test_ticket_unblock.py.*test_batch_close' .test-index
- [ ] Each test creates its own isolated temp tracker fixture
  Verify: grep -c 'mkdtemp\|tmp_path\|tempfile' tests/scripts/test_ticket_unblock.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: ruff check passes, all test functions verified, tests confirmed RED ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
